title: Clavis
description: Locked chests open through a skill-based mini-game, with better performance giving better loot
body:
![Title](https://i.imgur.com/k5YP05X.png)

Clavis transforms the traditional loot system: every loot chest is now locked and can be opened through a simple yet engaging mini-game. The better you perform, the richer your reward - up to nearly double the loot for a perfect result.

![Mod showcase](https://i.imgur.com/3JFiXaW.gif)

_Lock's difficulty depends on how valuable the loot inside is. The richer the loot, the harder the lockpicking mini-game: faster speed, more tasks, and extra rules that change how the game plays. There are 3 main difficulty levels, marked by the color of the smiley in the mini-game interface and the outline color of the lock floating above the chest. This lets you decide in advance whether the chest is worth your time._

***

**What will I get with this mod?**

**If I'm a player:**
* The better my skills, the more loot I get from each chest.
* Opening chests becomes a fun challenge rather than a routine click.
* Rewards feel earned - high-tier loot isn’t just handed over.

**If I'm a modpack developer:**
* I can make dungeon loot less overpowered in the early game, preventing players from getting strong items too soon.
* Easily balance loot economy and progression.
* Increase player engagement - every chest becomes a small event.

***

_Clavis makes opening chests a part of the adventure, not just a moment of free loot._

***

![Art](https://i.imgur.com/bbASBLc.png)
